news.headline: Enact secures $90 million in excess of loss reinsurance coverage from reinsurers as part of diversified program.
news.summary: Acquiring around $90 million of excess of loss reinsurance coverage from a group of reinsurers.

news.headline: Dynavax begins Phase 1/2 trial for new shingles vaccine; first participant dosed.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company, Dynavax Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: DVAX), based in Emeryville, California, disclosed that the initial participant in a Phase 1/2 clinical trial has been administered the dose. This trial marks a significant step in the company's development and commercialization of groundbreaking vaccines. The event took place on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Skechers (NYSE: SKX) to reveal Q2 2024 financial results on July 25, following market close. Execs to discuss in conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Skechers USA, Inc. (NYSE: SKX), a leading global footwear company known for its comfort technology, has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 on Thursday, July 25th, after the markets shut. The post-market event will see David Weinberg, the Chief Operating Officer, and John Vandemore, the Chief Financial Officer, discuss the numbers in a conference call scheduled for around 4:30 p.m. ET / 1:30 p.m. PT on the same day. The call will offer insights into the company's recent financial standing and future outlook.

news.headline: Paradigm urges European regulators to reconsider MEV handling, warns against industry repercussions without alternative solutions.
news.summary: The venture capitalist firm expressed concerns about ESMA's handling of crypto market abuse, warning that their current approach could potentially harm the industry. They did not offer any alternative solutions to address the issue.

news.headline: Pinstripes reports $36.2 million in revenue for fiscal Q4 2024, up by 5.9% from previous year.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois-based Pinstripes Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PNST), a leading experiential dining and entertainment brand featuring bistro, bowling, and bocce, released its financial outcomes for the fiscal year that concluded on April 28, 2024. In the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2024, the company experienced a significant 5.9% rise in total revenue, reaching $36.2 million compared to the same period in the previous year. Notably, food and beverage revenues also saw an increase. Pinstripes is renowned for its unique blend of dining and entertainment offerings, as well as its private event spaces.

news.headline: Federal Reserve set to announce annual bank stress test results on Jun 26, dictating large banks' capital needs and shareholder payouts. Last year, JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, and Citigroup raised dividends. Stress tests evaluate banks' resilience under adverse scenarios.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve will announce its annual bank health check results, known as the 'stress test', on Jun 26. This test assesses how much capital large banks need to endure potential sector turmoil. Last year, banks like JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, and Citigroup raised their quarterly dividends. These stress tests have been mandated since 2009 under the Dodd-Frank financial law to evaluate banks' capital adequacy, liquidity, and risk management under adverse scenarios like recession or asset price decline. This year's results will determine dividend payouts and share repurchases for banks.

news.headline: Gain Therapeutics, Inc. names Gene Mack as Interim CEO in recent move.
Coinbase advisor to support Biden’s reelection campaign. Keisha Lance Bottoms may advise on crypto, after discussing digital assets in Atlanta.
news.summary: Keisha Lance Bottoms' potential involvement in advising the campaign on cryptocurrencies remains uncertain following her discussion on digital assets in Atlanta. This occurred the day prior to the presidential debate, where she shared insights on the subject.

news.headline: DuPont declares $0.38/share quarterly dividend on Common Stock, payable on Sept. 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on June 27, 2024, DuPont disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share on the Common Stock (with a par value of $0.01 per share). This dividend is payable on September 16, 2024.

news.headline: Natural Grocers CFO Todd Dissinger to retire on Dec 31, 2024. He will continue to serve until then.
news.summary: Today, on June 27, 2024, in Lakewood, Colorado, Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. (NYSE: NGVC) disclosed that Todd Dissinger, their Chief Financial Officer, plans to retire on December 31, 2024. Despite this decision, he will retain his position as Chief Financial Officer until the specified date.

news.headline: AAR honored as one of America's Greatest Workplaces 2024 by Newsweek for employee satisfaction. Wood Dale, Illinois, June 27, 2024. NYSE: AIR.
news.summary: AAR CORP. has been acknowledged for its dedication to enhancing employee contentment, achieved through its focus on fostering a people-centered atmosphere, offering competitive pay, and providing avenues for career growth. The award, received on June 27, 2024, in Wood Dale, Illinois, highlights the company's efforts in ensuring employee satisfaction. AAR CORP. (NYSE: AIR), a major player in the industry, has been recognized for its commitment to employee welfare and growth opportunities.

news.headline: Financial Trust Asset Management listed on PSN Top Guns List for best performing strategies in 1Q 2024, published by Zephyr.
news.summary: Financial Trust Asset Management, based in Boca Raton, Florida, was recently recognized in the Quarterly PSN Top Guns List published by Zephyr. This list highlights the top performers in separate accounts, managed accounts, and managed ETF strategies. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Financial Trust Asset Management's exceptional performance earned them a spot on this prestigious list, showcasing their expertise in financial management. This recognition underscores the firm's success in the industry.

news.headline: Boardwalktech Software Corp reported fourth-quarter and annual fiscal 2024 financial results.
news.summary: Cupertino, California - Boardwalktech Software Corp. (TSXV: BWLK) (OTCQB: BWLKF) announced its fiscal year 2024 financial results. The company, known for its digital ledger platform and enterprise software solutions, reported positive numbers for the year ending in June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Abcourt completes last part of private unit placement, raises $627,570.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 3.9%, with a total of 6.6 million people currently unemployed. Additionally, the economy added 943,000 jobs in the past month, marking a significant increase from previous months. This surge in employment is attributed to various sectors including manufacturing, construction, and professional services. Despite these positive trends, experts are cautious about the potential impact of rising inflation and ongoing supply chain disruptions on the job market in the coming months. Overall, the improving job market reflects a positive trajectory for the U.S. economy amidst ongoing challenges.

news.headline: Kirkland's announces results of 2024 Annual Meeting. Ann Joyce named Board Chair. Held on June 26, 2024. Nasdaq: KIRK.
news.summary: Ann Joyce has been appointed as the Board Chair in Nashville, Tennessee on June 27, 2024. Kirkland's, Inc. (Nasdaq: KIRK), also known as Kirkland's Home, revealed the outcomes of its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders that took place on June 26, 2024. Kirkland's is a specialty retailer that focuses on home décor and furnishings.

news.headline: FRC President Tony Perkins criticizes U.S. Supreme Court for not backing Idaho's abortion law in Idaho v. U.S.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Tony Perkins, President of the Family Research Council, issued a statement reacting to the U.S. Supreme Court's decision regarding Idaho v. U.S. where the Court did not support Idaho's right to protect the unborn. The case revolved around a challenge to an Idaho law.

news.headline: Elicio Therapeutics (Nasdaq: ELTX) announces a public offering of common stock and warrants, subject to market conditions.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Elicio Therapeutics, Inc. announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering of its shares of common stock and accompanying common warrants. The offering includes pre-funded warrants for certain investors who opt for them. Elicio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapies for cancer treatment. The public offering's completion and final size and terms are subject to market conditions, with no guarantees on the outcome. The common stock, pre-funded warrants, and accompanying common warrants are all offered by Elicio. Elicio Therapeutics is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol “ELTX”.

news.headline: Prairie Provident extends senior credit facility to July 31, 2024, defers interest payments, in talks for further extension.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 27, 2024, Prairie Provident Resources Inc. disclosed an extension of the maturity date for its senior secured credit facility, known as the "First Lien Loan," until July 31, 2024. In addition, all interest payment responsibilities related to the loan have been deferred. The Company, listed under TSX as PPR, is currently in negotiations with its lender for a potential additional extension of the First Lien Loan.

news.headline: Workhorse partners with Surefitters to offer new upfit program for commercial EVs, expanding product line.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, American technology company Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) revealed a collaboration with Surefitters from Rosemount, MN, to introduce a new upfit program. This initiative aims to provide various upfit options for Workhorse's medium-duty commercial EVs, as part of their commitment to advancing zero-emission commercial vehicles.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable to host Q2 2024 results conference call on August 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Brookfield Renewable announced their plans to host the Second Quarter 2024 Conference Call and Webcast on August 2, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this event is to discuss the results and business initiatives of the company. Brookfield Renewable can be found under the ticker symbols NYSE: BEP, BEPC and TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC.

news.headline: Acasti reached 50% enrollment in Phase 3 STRIVE-ON trial, aiming for completion by late 2024 to early 2025. NDA submission expected in 1H 2025.
news.summary: The company expects to finish enrolling patients in the STRIVE-ON trial between late 2024 and early 2025. They are on schedule for a potential submission of the New Drug Application (NDA) in the first half of the calendar year 2025.

news.headline: Avadel Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: AVDL) will join Russell 3000® Index on July 1, 2024, as per announcement.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (Nasdaq: AVDL) revealed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index following the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution. This change will take effect on July 1, 2024, at the opening of US equity markets. The preliminary list of additions was shared on May 24, 2024. Avadel Pharmaceutical plc, a biopharmaceutical company, aims to revolutionize medicines to enhance lives. The company's transition to the Russell 3000® Index signifies a significant milestone and potential opportunities for growth and visibility in the market.

news.headline: Verizon adds Caroline A. Litchfield, Merck CFO, to its Board effective Oct. 1, 2024. Announcement made on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc revealed today the appointment of Caroline A. Litchfield, currently serving as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Merck & Co., Inc., to join their Board of Directors, starting from October 1, 2024. Caroline A. Litchfield's inclusion in the Verizon Board of Directors comes as a significant addition, bringing diverse expertise to the company. Verizon, a prominent player in the communication industry, is listed on NYSE and Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VZ. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing the board's capabilities with the valuable experience and leadership that Caroline A. Litchfield offers.

news.headline: Stocks rise slightly with Dow closing higher as investors anticipate Friday's inflation report.
Horizon Bancorp will hold conference call at 7:30am CT on July 25, 2024 to discuss second quarter results.
news.summary: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. (referred to as "Horizon") has scheduled a conference call for Thursday, July 25, 2024, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time. During this call, the company will be discussing its performance in the second quarter of 2024.

news.headline: QIAGEN pleased with U.S. guidelines for using QuantiFERON-TB Gold Plus to detect TB in children, as AAP now advises IGRA tests for all ages to fight the spread of infection.
news.summary: The American Academy of Pediatrics in the United States is now urging the use of IGRA tests, such as QuantiFERON-TB Gold Plus, to screen children at risk of tuberculosis across all age groups. This new recommendation aligns with the current U.S. tuberculosis control guidelines that prioritize the adoption of advanced blood-based tests to prevent the transmission of the dangerous bacterial infection. The move highlights a growing emphasis on utilizing modern diagnostic tools to tackle the potential risks associated with tuberculosis in children.

news.headline: Kura Sushi USA releases unaudited financial results for Q3 2024; details to be published soon.
news.summary: Kura Sushi USA, Inc., based in Irvine, California, disclosed their preliminary unaudited results for the third quarter of fiscal 2024 on June 27. The company, listed as KRUS on NASDAQ, is known for its tech-driven Japanese restaurant concept. The announcement did not include specific numbers or details, but it gives an overview of the company's financial performance for that period.

news.headline: Premium Income Corporation reported an increase in net assets by $42.4 million, reaching $47.9 million as of April 30, 2024, with cash distributions of $0.43 per Preferred share and $0.41 per Class A share.
news.summary: Premium Income Corporation reported its financial results for the six months ending April 30, 2024. The net assets attributable to holders of Class A shares increased by $42.4 million during this period, reaching $47.9 million as of April 30, 2024. This translates to an increase of $2.62 per Class A share, which was valued at $2.77 by the end of the period. The corporation paid out cash distributions of $0.43 per Preferred share and $0.41 per Class A share. The company primarily invests in common shares of major Canadian banks and employs a covered call writing strategy to boost income and minimize volatility. The investment portfolio is managed by Mulvihill Capital Management Inc, and the Fund's shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under symbols PIC.PR.A and PIC.A.

news.headline: Dynagas LNG Partners LP reported Q1 2024 results: Net Income $11.8M, Earnings per common unit $0.23, Adjusted EBITDA $29.0M. Recent financing deal with China Development Bank for $345.0M and full prepayment of $675M Credit Facility. Russian sanctions impact being monitored.
news.summary: Dynagas LNG Partners LP reported its financial results for the three months ending March 31, 2024. They announced net income of $11.8 million, earnings per common unit of $0.23, adjusted net income of $12.4 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $29.0 million. The company declared a cash distribution for preferred units and entered into a lease financing agreement worth $345.0 million. The fleet had 100% utilization and an estimated contract backlog of approximately $1.07 billion as of June 27, 2024. The partnership also discussed the impact of Russian conflicts with Ukraine on their operations and financial forecasts.

news.headline: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. saw FY24 net sales rise to $201.1 million, GAAP gross margin at 44%, FY24 traditional channel sales $116.8 million, e-commerce channel sales $84.3 million, and operating cash flow $24.5 million.CEO highlights growth, innovation, expanded presence, and future strategies.
news.summary: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. reported their financial results for fiscal year 2024 with net sales reaching $201.1 million, a 5.2% increase from the previous year. The gross margin was 44.0%. Traditional channel sales were at $116.8 million, while e-commerce channel sales amounted to $84.3 million. The operating cash flow for the year was $24.5 million. The company experienced growth in various channels despite facing challenges such as higher inventory purchases and higher promotional product discounts. The CEO highlighted strategic milestones achieved and growth in traditional sales by over 12%. The company also reported quarterly net sales of $46.3 million, with a quarterly net loss of $5.3 million. Measures such as non-GAAP net income and Adjusted EBITDAS were used to assess performance. Strategic actions were focused on expanding market reach, introducing new products, and ensuring financial stability. The company's financial position as of the end of the year showed total assets of $240.6 million and total liabilities of $62.7 million. The equity stood at $177.9 million. The company expressed confidence in its future growth potential amid economic uncertainties.

news.headline: CSG to host Q2 earnings call on Aug. 7, 2024, 5:00 p.m. ET. Dial 1-888-412-4131, passcode 2327393. Featuring CEO and CFO.
news.summary: CSG (NASDAQ: CSGS) is hosting a conference call on August 7, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review their second quarter earnings. Presenting will be CSG's president and CEO Brian Shepherd along with CFO Hai Tran. To join, dial 1-888-412-4131 using passcode 2327393. An alternative option is to access the live or archived webcast of the earnings call. CSG specializes in providing solutions in the field of technology and communication.

news.headline: Fluor chosen to provide EPCM services for Phase One of Northvolt's large-scale lithium-ion battery facility in Germany.
news.summary: Fluor, based in Irving, Texas, has secured the contract to offer Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management (EPCM) services for the initial phase of Northvolt's extensive Lithium-Ion Battery Facility based in Germany. This signifies a significant venture in the Advanced Manufacturing sector.

news.headline: Medius partners with Domo for sales analysis. Processes $200B+ annually for 4,000+ customers worldwide.
news.summary: A company based in Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) revealed that Medius, a prominent provider of accounts payable software, relies on Domo for assessing the effectiveness of its sales and marketing strategies. Additionally, Medius leverages Domo to enhance funnel efficiencies, pinpoint new growth possibilities, and boost sales volume and speed throughout the organization. With a client base spanning 102 countries, Medius handles over $200 billion in yearly spending for more than 4,000 customers. Their focus remains on aiding businesses in achieving their objectives.

news.headline: Maximus receives $87 million IRS contract for development and modernization services.
news.summary: A contract worth $87 million has been granted by the IRS to Maximus for a period of five years. The contract pertains to providing comprehensive development and modernization services.

news.headline: Manulife IM partners with Foundry Commercial to develop industrial outdoor storage sites in SE markets.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Manulife Investment Management (Manulife IM) revealed a new collaboration with Foundry Commercial to purchase, enhance, and rent out industrial outdoor storage (IOS) facilities in important infill industrial regions across the Southeast. The partnership aims to target a portfolio of properties for this purpose.

news.headline: Axcelis Tech appoints David Ryzhik as SVP of Investor Relations & Corporate Strategy. Doug Lawson to retire. Nasdaq: ACLS.
news.summary: Axcelis Technologies, Inc. has recently revealed the retirement plans of Doug Lawson, the Executive Vice President of Corporate Marketing and Strategy. The announcement was made in Beverly, Massachusetts on June 27, 2024. Axcelis Technologies, Inc. is a prominent company known for providing ion implantation solutions for the semiconductor industry. This news marks a significant development for the company and its stakeholders as Doug Lawson has played a crucial role in the corporate marketing and strategy department. Axcelis Technologies, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol ACLS.

news.headline: Premium Income Corp (PIC) reports $42.4 million increase in net assets for six months  ended April 30, 2024, with $47.9 million net assets as of this date. Cash distributions: $0.43 per Preferred share and $0.41 per Class A share paid.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Premium Income Corporation (TSX: PIC.A; PIC.PR.A) released its operational results for the first six months ending on April 30, 2024. The net assets for holders of Class A shares increased by $42.4 million, reaching $47.9 million or $2.77 per share. Cash distributions for the period included $0.43 per Preferred share and $0.41 per Class A share.

news.headline: Accolade reports fiscal first quarter results ending May 31, 2024, in Seattle. Stock symbol: ACCD.
news.summary: Accolade, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACCD) unveiled their financial results for the fiscal first quarter concluding on May 31, 2024, on June 27, 2024, in Seattle.

news.headline: EPIcenter energy hub completes mission, donates $273,000 to local foundation for scholarships - San Antonio.
news.summary: A nonprofit energy innovation hub based in San Antonio, Texas, EPIcenter, has successfully fulfilled its mission since being founded in 2015 by CPS Energy, Itron, Landis+Gyr, and OCI Solar Power. The hub has now evolved into a fully operational startup offering innovation consulting services, thought leadership programs, and support for energy entrepreneurs. After accomplishing its overarching goals, EPIcenter has revealed its intention to contribute its financial surplus.

news.headline: GSR predicts Solana ETFs may outperform Bitcoin and get quick approval in Trump presidency, boosting U.S. market.
news.summary: GSR, a major player in the crypto market, is optimistic about the potential for Solana's ETF in the United States. This sentiment is especially strong if Donald Trump wins the presidential election later this year.

news.headline: Method unveils new bottles made with 100% recycled coastal plastic sourced through partnership with Plastic Bank.
news.summary: method has recently introduced a new line of bottles that are crafted solely from 100% recycled coastal plastic, obtained through a collaboration between SC Johnson and Plastic Bank. This initiative marks a significant step towards enhancing the environmental friendliness of their products. The company, method, based in San Francisco, announced this development on June 27, 2024. They are striving to make a positive impact by utilizing recovered coastal plastic to create these bottles, thus contributing to a more sustainable future. This move showcases their commitment to eco-conscious practices and reducing waste.

news.headline: Allied Gold Corp (TSX: AAUC) releases 2023 Sustainability Report, detailing business strategy and sustainability efforts.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) disclosed its 2023 Sustainability Report, which details the Company’s approach to sustainability throughout its operations, projects, and offices. The report sheds light on how Allied incorporates sustainability into its business strategy.

news.headline: Quantum Computing Inc. receives Nasdaq non-compliance notice on June 27, 2024. Stock symbol: QUBT.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, on June 27, 2024, Quantum Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: QUBT) disclosed that it was notified by Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") regarding certain events. Quantum Computing Inc. is a pioneering company specializing in quantum optics and nanophotonics technology. The specifics of the notification were not disclosed, but it is a significant development for the company listed on the NASDAQ exchange.

news.headline: Mountain Parks Electric partners with Conexon Connect for broadband in 5 counties, serving 18,000 homes in rural Colorado.
news.summary: Conexon Connect, a rural fiber-optic network leader, is set to launch the second Connect fiber-to-the-home network in Colorado. This network will cover five counties, providing high-speed internet to a total of 18,000 homes and businesses served by the cooperative. Established in Kansas City on June 27, 2024, Conexon Connect is the ISP behind this initiative, ensuring improved connectivity for residents and enterprises in the region.

news.headline: Bank OZK to release Q2 2024 earnings on July 17, 2024 after market close; management comments to be available online.
news.summary: Little Rock, Arkansas - Bank OZK plans to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, July 17, 2024, after the market closes. The Bank, listed on Nasdaq as OZK, will share management's insights on the quarter alongside the earnings press release. Investors can access this information on the Bank's investor relations website.

news.headline: Elicio Therapeutics reports encouraging disease-free survival data in pancreatic cancer study ELI-002 7P.
news.summary: In a recent study, ELI-002 7P was given as a standalone treatment at the Phase 2 dose. Initial findings reveal promising Disease-Free Survival results for patients with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. The study demonstrates the potential efficacy of ELI-002 7P as a monotherapy in treating this type of cancer. Further analysis is warranted to confirm these encouraging results and evaluate the impact of this treatment on patient outcomes.

news.headline: Eliem Therapeutics closes acquisition of Tenet Medicines, secures $120M for anti-CD19 antibody development.
news.summary: Eliem will prioritize the development of TNT119, a novel anti-CD19 antibody intended for the treatment of various autoimmune conditions. These include systemic lupus erythematosus, immune thrombocytopenia, and membranous nephropathy. This antibody shows promise in addressing these disorders by targeting CD19. This approach has the potential to help a significant number of patients suffering from autoimmune diseases.

news.headline: Michael Lilly appointed President of TwinSpires Horse Racing, the top legal online horse betting site and Kentucky Derby partner.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on June 27, 2024, Churchill Downs Incorporated (CDI) revealed the promotion of Michael Lilly as President of TwinSpires Horse Racing, a major player in legal online horse betting and the endorsed betting associate of the renowned Kentucky Derby. Lilly's new position grants him authority over the strategic direction and management of TwinSpires Horse Racing under CDI's TwinSpires Segment.

news.headline: AI bots on TikTok pose a threat, says reports.
Integer Holdings Corp (NYSE: ITGR) set Q2 2024 earnings release on July 25, 2024, at 7am CT / 8am ET with a webcast at 8am CT / 9am ET.
news.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation (NYSE:ITGR) from Plano, Texas, is set to unveil its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2024 on July 25, 2024. The results will be published at 7 a.m. Central Time (CT) / 8 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), followed by a webcast led by Integer management at 8 a.m. CT / 9 a.m. ET to delve into the details. During the call, alongside the quarterly results, other significant forward-looking and material data could also be addressed.
